data.current_description: Creates a new map within the Felt platform.

data.current_description: Refreshes data for URL-based layers with live sources.
data.description_suggestion: Refreshes data for URL-based layers with live data sources. Requires the map ID and layer ID as path parameters to identify the target layer. Returns a RefreshResponse containing the refresh status and timestamp of the last data update. This operation fetches the latest data from the layer's source URL and updates the layer's content on the map. Only applicable to layers created via URL import.
